item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters OPEN HEART DYNJ909090B OPEN HEART CDS QVH CDS982523M Recall
item.product: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters OPEN HEART DYNJ909090B OPEN HEART CDS QVH CDS982523M
item.summary: Kits contain Swan-Ganz catheters recalled by Becton Dickinson (BD). BD has received complaints of leaks/breakage involving failures of the (blue) proximal injectate lumen hub on these catheters. This has led to instances of leakage, lumen damage, and breakage, and may lead to infection, medication loss, and/or blood loss. Product details: Medline Convenience kits containing recalled Swan-Ganz Catheters OPEN HEART DYNJ909090B OPEN HEART CDS QVH CDS982523M
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of AZ, CA, FL, IL, MO, NJ, OH, OK, TN, TX, WI.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
